applications.title: Applications
applications.confirmDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete application "{{name}}"?

copy.createSchemaDisabledHint: Enable "Copy connector" to make schema creation available.
copy.syncFailed: Application was copied, but schema creation failed. You can retry schema sync from the application panel.

parameters.visibilityHint: Application visibility can be changed after creation.
parameters.visibilityMutableHint: Application visibility can be changed after creation. Workspace mode remains fixed.
parameters.workspacesHint: Workspace mode cannot be disabled after the application is created.
parameters.workspacesLocked: Workspace mode is fixed after creation and cannot be changed.
parameters.publicRequiresWorkspaces: Workspaces are recommended for public applications to isolate data for each participant.
parameters.publicWorkspacesRecommended: Workspaces are recommended for public applications to isolate data for each participant.

join.dialogDescription: Join this application to start using it.

leave.dialogDescription: If you leave this application, your workspace and all related data will be archived and removed from your view.

settings.title: Application Settings
settings.dialogSizePresetDescription: Default size for popup windows in this application control panel.
settings.dialogAllowFullscreenDescription: Show a header action that expands application popup windows almost to the full viewport.
settings.dialogAllowResizeDescription: Show a resize handle and remember the custom popup size in this browser for this application.
settings.dialogCloseBehaviorDescription: Choose whether application popup windows stay modal or can close when the user clicks outside the window.
settings.visibilityClosedDescription: Closed applications are visible only to current members and users with global application access.
settings.visibilityPublicDescription: Public applications can be discovered and joined directly by authenticated users.
settings.workspaceModeReadOnly: Workspace mode is selected during application creation and cannot be changed after the runtime structure is defined.
settings.sectionLinksEnabledDescription: Give every application menu section its own browser URL based on the section identifier.
settings.limitsHint: Set row limits per catalog for every workspace. When the limit is reached, users will not be able to create more records in that catalog.
settings.limitsRequiresSchema: Limits settings will become available after the application schema is created.
settings.limitsRequiresWorkspaces: Limits are available only for applications created with workspace mode enabled.
settings.missingApplicationId: Application ID is missing in URL

layouts.title: Layouts
layouts.name: Name
layouts.schemaNotReady: Create or sync the application schema before managing layouts.
layouts.dragHint: Drag widgets between zones to change runtime composition.
layouts.widgetEditorDescription: Edit the widget configuration for advanced cases.
layouts.widgetConfigInvalid: Widget configuration must be valid JSON.
layouts.emptyZone: No widgets in this zone yet.

sharedBehavior.title: Shared behavior
sharedBehavior.description: Control how inherited catalog layouts can exclude, deactivate, or move this widget.

widgetBehaviorEditor.title: Widget behavior
widgetBehaviorEditor.description: Configure how inherited layouts can override this widget.

columnsEditor.title: Columns container
columnsEditor.description: Build a multi-column center widget composition and reorder columns with drag and drop.

menuEditor.title: Menu widget
menuEditor.maxPrimaryItemsHint: Extra active menu items are moved into the overflow menu.
menuEditor.startPageHint: Use a hub/catalog id or codename to choose the first opened section.
menuEditor.workspacePlacementHint: Workspace navigation can stay in the main menu, move to overflow, or be hidden.

validation.catalogRequired: Select a catalog for this menu item.
validation.hrefRequired: Link URL is required for link items.
validation.hrefUnsafeScheme: This link type is not allowed. Use https, mailto, tel, #, or an internal path.

layouts.catalogBehaviorDescriptionGlobal: These settings define the default create/search behavior for linkedCollections that use this global layout until a catalog-specific layout overrides it.
layouts.catalogBehaviorDescriptionCatalog: This catalog layout overrides the create/search behavior inherited from its global base layout.
layouts.viewSettingsDescription: Control how the runtime list view behaves for this layout.

board.title: Application Board
board.description: Analytics and statistics for this application (in development)

migrations.title: Migrations
migrations.description: Total migrations in this application (demo data)

members.title: Members
members.description: Users with access to this application

documentation.title: Explore Documentation
documentation.description: Learn about application features, API and best practices

errors.missingApplicationId: Application ID is missing in URL

app.noFields: No fields configured for this section.
app.deleteConfirmDescription: This element will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
app.errorSchemaChanged: Schema has changed since this form was opened. Please close and try again.
app.workspaceLimitReached: The workspace limit for this section has been reached ({{current}} / {{max}}).

connectors.title: Connectors
connectors.description: Data containers that define the structure of your application
connectors.emptyDescription: Create your first connector to start defining data structures
connectors.singleConnectorLimit: Currently, only one Connector per Application is supported. Also, after creation, a Connector cannot be deleted separately, only together with the entire Application. These limitations will be removed in future versions of Universo Platformo.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Connector
deleteDialog.confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete connector "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

connectors.codenameHelper: Unique identifier for URLs (lowercase Latin letters, numbers, hyphens). Auto-generated from the name with transliteration. You can edit it manually.

validation.codenameInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only

create.metahubInfo: Select a Metahub to link this connector to. The connector will sync data from the selected Metahub schema.
create.metahubSelected: Metahub selected. After creation, the connector will be linked to this Metahub.
create.metahubRequired: Please select a Metahub. A connector must be linked to exactly one Metahub.
create.publicationInfo: Select a Publication to link this connector to. The connector will sync data from the selected Publication schema.
create.publicationSelected: Publication selected. After creation, the connector will be linked to this Publication.
create.publicationRequired: Please select a Publication. A connector must be linked to exactly one Publication.

diffDialog.title: Schema Changes
diffDialog.uiLayoutUpdate: UI layout settings will be updated
diffDialog.uiLayoutsUpdate: UI layouts list will be updated
diffDialog.uiLayoutZonesUpdate: UI layout zone widgets will be updated
diffDialog.layoutConflictWarning: Layout changes may conflict with application-side customizations. Choose how metahub layout updates should be handled during sync.

layoutResolution.label: Layout update policy
layoutResolution.keepApplication: Keep application changes and mark conflicts
layoutResolution.copySourceAsApplication: Copy metahub source as a new application layout
layoutResolution.skipSource: Skip this metahub layout update for now
layoutResolution.overwriteLocal: Replace the application layout with metahub source
layoutResolution.required: Choose a bulk policy or set explicit per-layout resolutions before sync is enabled.
layoutResolution.ready: The current layout conflict policy is complete. Review optional overrides before syncing if needed.
layoutResolution.choosePolicy: Choose a bulk policy for required layout conflicts

diffDialog.schemaNotExists: Schema does not exist yet. It will be created on first sync.
diffDialog.schemaWillBeCreated: The following schema will be created:

summary.upToDate: Schema is already up to date

diffDialog.destructiveWarning: The following changes may result in data loss:

metahubs.title: Linked Metahubs
metahubs.allLinked: All available metahubs are already linked
metahubs.singleModeInfo: This connector is configured to use a single metahub. Remove the current link to change.
metahubs.singleModeHint: Remove current metahub to link a different one
metahubs.cannotRemoveLast: At least one metahub is required

metahubInfo.locked: Changing metahub links and settings is currently locked. This will be available in future versions.
metahubInfo.isSingleLocked: This setting is currently locked to "On"
metahubInfo.isSingleHelp: Connector can only be linked to one Metahub
metahubInfo.isRequiredLocked: This setting is currently locked to "On"
metahubInfo.isRequiredHelp: Connector must have at least one Metahub linked

publications.title: Linked Publications
publications.allLinked: All available publications are already linked
publications.isRequiredEnabled: Connector must have at least one linked Publication
publications.isSingleEnabled: Connector can only be linked to one Publication
publications.isSingleDisabled: Connector can be linked to multiple publications
publications.isSingleWarning: Cannot enable while multiple publications are selected
publications.singleModeInfo: This connector is configured to use a single publication. Remove the current link to change.
publications.singleModeHint: Remove current publication to link a different one
publications.cannotRemoveLast: At least one publication is required
publications.emptyState: No publications available. Create a publication in a Metahub first.

publicationInfo.locked: Publication links and constraints are currently locked. This functionality will be available in a future update.
publicationInfo.isSingleLocked: This setting is currently locked to "On"
publicationInfo.isSingleHelp: Connector can only be linked to one Publication
publicationInfo.isRequiredLocked: This setting is currently locked to "On"
publicationInfo.isRequiredHelp: Connector must have at least one Publication linked

members.confirmRemoveDescription: Are you sure you want to remove {{email}} from this application?

migrationGuard.descriptionMandatory: This application requires a mandatory update before it can be used. Please synchronize the schema in the control panel.
migrationGuard.descriptionRecommended: A recommended update is available for this application. You can continue using it, but synchronization is advised.

blockers.schema_not_created: Application schema has not been created yet.
blockers.seed.current_unavailable: Current template seed is unavailable. Cleanup cannot be analyzed safely.
blockers.seed.target_unavailable: Target template seed is unavailable. Cleanup cannot be analyzed safely.
blockers.entity.audit_provenance: Entity "{{entityKey}}" has been modified by a user and cannot be cleaned up automatically.
blockers.entity.attribute_extra: Attribute "{{attribute}}" of entity "{{entityKey}}" was added outside the template seed.
blockers.entity.attribute_audit: Attribute "{{attribute}}" of entity "{{entityKey}}" has been modified by a user.
blockers.entity.element_mismatch: Element at position {{sortOrder}} of entity "{{entityKey}}" does not match the template seed.
blockers.entity.element_audit: Element at position {{sortOrder}} of entity "{{entityKey}}" has been modified by a user.
blockers.setting.audit_provenance: Setting "{{settingKey}}" has been modified by a user and cannot be cleaned up.
blockers.setting.value_mismatch: Setting "{{settingKey}}" has a value that differs from the template seed baseline.

blockers.template.structure_incompatible: Template requires structure version {{required}}, but target is {{target}}.
blockers.template.cleanup_dry_run: Cleanup mode "dry_run" cannot apply destructive changes. Use "confirm" mode.
